items.title: Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform on Caterpillar, Raises Price Target to $700
items.description: Oppenheimer  analyst Kristen Owen   maintains Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $645 to $700.

items.title: HD Hyundai Goes All-In On Palantir AI In Expanded Group-Wide Deal
items.description: HD Hyundai expands partnership with Palantir, using Foundry & AI Platform for digital transformation and cross-subsidiary coordination.

items.title: Will Caterpillar’s AI-Enabled Fleet and Factory Upgrades Change Caterpillar's (CAT) Narrative
items.description: Caterpillar Inc. recently unveiled a suite of Industrial AI advances, including the Cat AI Assistant and expanded NVIDIA collaboration, aimed at bringing AI-enabled autonomy and intelligent in-cab experiences to construction, mining and power equipment, while also using digital twins and AI to reshape its manufacturing and supply chain operations. These moves suggest Caterpillar is working to turn its installed base of heavy machinery into a connected, AI-ready platform that could embed the...

items.title: Wall Street sinks as Trump threatens 8 European countries with tariffs over Greenland
items.description: Stocks slumped on Wall Street Tuesday after President Donald Trump threatened to hit eight European countries with new tariffs as tensions escalate over his attempts to assert American control over Greenland.  Technology stocks were the heaviest weights on the market.  Nvidia, one of the most valuable companies in the world, plunged 4.4%.
